/usr/bin/c++ -O2 CMakeFiles/http_server.dir/src/http/HttpContext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/http_server.dir/src/http/HttpServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/http_server.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o http_server   -L/home/avery/code/muduo/build/release-install-cpp11/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/avery/code/muduo/build/release-install-cpp11/lib -lmuduo_net -lmuduo_base -lpthread
